mapper.select: SELECT id, script_id, version_no, version_status, description, published_at, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM script_version WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM script_version WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND version_status = 'DRAFT' AND deleted = 0
SELECT MAX(version_no) FROM script_version WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND deleted = 0
